title: erica pinea var. viscosissima
intro: Erica pinea var. viscosissima, also known as the sticky heath or sticky heather, is a variety of heath plant that belongs to the Ericaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erica pinea var. viscosissima include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
